segments.narrative: Un rugido. Un nombre que trasciende el deporte.
segments.visual_prompt: Ultra-wide shot of a massive, roaring stadium crowd, a blur of red and white, spotlights cutting through the evening haze, capturing the electric atmosphere before a major football match. Cinematic, photorealistic, high-contrast, moody lighting, shot from a high vantage point.

segments.narrative: Cristiano Ronaldo. Más que un atleta, un fenómeno.
segments.visual_prompt: Dramatic, slow-motion shot of Cristiano Ronaldo mid-air, executing a powerful bicycle kick, his muscles defined, expression intensely focused, under bright stadium lights. Photorealistic, high-frame rate, dynamic low-angle shot from behind the goal.

segments.narrative: ¿Cómo forja un joven de Madeira una leyenda global?
segments.visual_prompt: Overhead drone shot of the rugged, green hills and coastal towns of Funchal, Madeira, bathed in soft morning light, a small, worn football pitch visible in the distance, surrounded by simple, colorful houses. Documentary style, breathtaking landscape, serene.

segments.narrative: Su infancia fue de escasos recursos, pero rica en sueños.
segments.visual_prompt: Cinematic close-up of a young boy's (approx. 8-10 years old, resembling young Ronaldo) worn-out football boots, covered in dust, next to a patched-up leather ball on a dry, cracked dirt field. Gritty, realistic, natural sunlight, shallow depth of field, low-angle.

segments.narrative: El balón era su escape, su promesa de un futuro mejor.
segments.visual_prompt: Medium shot of a determined young boy (young Ronaldo) intently dribbling a football through a narrow, cobbled street in a Portuguese neighborhood, late afternoon sun casting long, sharp shadows. Vibrant, photorealistic, handheld documentary film style.

segments.narrative: En Sporting Lisboa, su talento explotó.
segments.visual_prompt: Dynamic, mid-shot of a teenage Cristiano Ronaldo (Sporting Lisbon jersey, flowing hair) deftly controlling the ball during an intense training session, sweat glistening under bright practice field lights. Energetic, photorealistic, action shot, slightly wide lens.

segments.narrative: Manchester United lo elevó al estrellato mundial.
segments.visual_prompt: Iconic shot of a younger Cristiano Ronaldo (Manchester United jersey) celebrating a goal, arms outstretched, bathed in the red glow of Old Trafford's stadium lights, a triumphant, almost defiant expression. High-energy, cinematic, low-angle.

segments.narrative: Pero fue en el Real Madrid donde se convirtió en leyenda.
segments.visual_prompt: Majestic, wide shot of Cristiano Ronaldo in a pristine white Real Madrid kit, standing confidently on the pitch of a packed Santiago Bernabéu stadium, arms crossed, bathed in a grand, almost ethereal golden hour light. Epic, iconic, from the stands perspective.

segments.narrative: Goles imposibles, récords destrozados, la 'Champions' su obsesión.
segments.visual_prompt: Fast-paced montage of extreme close-ups: a football net bulging in slow motion, a Champions League trophy being lifted in triumph, Ronaldo's intense gaze during a crucial penalty kick. Quick cuts, high-impact, sports action footage style, high contrast.

segments.narrative: Su secreto: una disciplina férrea, una ética de trabajo sin igual.
segments.visual_prompt: Gritty, close-up shot of Cristiano Ronaldo's incredibly defined leg muscles during an intense gym workout, sweat dripping, focused expression of exertion. High-contrast, black and white, dramatic side lighting emphasizing muscle definition, documentary style.

segments.narrative: Horas en el gimnasio, sacrificios personales.
segments.visual_prompt: Time-lapse style shot of a deserted football pitch at dawn, a lone figure (Ronaldo) beginning a solitary training session, mist rising from the grass, soft, cool light filtering through. Evokes solitude and early morning effort. Photorealistic, wide shot.

segments.narrative: No es solo talento, es la voluntad de ser el mejor.
segments.visual_prompt: Powerful, low-angle shot of Cristiano Ronaldo looking up towards the sky, fists clenched, after scoring a crucial goal, rain starting to fall, reflecting the stadium lights around him. Emotional, dramatic, cinematographic, shallow depth of field.

segments.narrative: Con Portugal, la Eurocopa fue su epopeya.
segments.visual_prompt: Historic, wide shot of Cristiano Ronaldo, with the Portugal captain's armband, lifting the Euro 2016 trophy above his head, surrounded by jubilant teammates and a cascade of red and green confetti. Celebratory, vivid colors, documentary snapshot.

segments.narrative: Una nación entera unida bajo su liderazgo.
segments.visual_prompt: Abstract, stylized image of the Portuguese flag gently waving in the wind, superimposed with a blurred silhouette of Ronaldo celebrating in the background. Evokes national pride and unity. Artistic, symbolic, soft focus, patriotic color palette.

segments.narrative: Más allá de los trofeos, su impacto es global.
segments.visual_prompt: Montage of diverse faces from different continents (children, adults, various ethnicities) watching football on screens, all captivated, some wearing Ronaldo jerseys. Global reach, inspiration, connection. Warm, inclusive lighting, dynamic cuts.

segments.narrative: Inspira a millones a perseguir sus sueños, sin importar el origen.
segments.visual_prompt: Heartwarming close-up of a young child (approx. 7 years old) in a humble, sun-drenched room, intently drawing a picture of Ronaldo with crayons, a hopeful and determined expression on their face. Soft, natural light, emphasizes innocence and aspiration.

segments.narrative: Cristiano Ronaldo: el hombre que redefinió los límites del fútbol.
segments.visual_prompt: Epic, artistic portrait of Cristiano Ronaldo, slightly aged, looking directly into the camera with a profound, knowing gaze. Backlit by a subtle, warm golden glow, symbolizing his enduring legacy and wisdom. High-resolution, fine art photography style, deep shadows.

segments.narrative: Su historia, un testimonio eterno de que el trabajo duro y la fe inquebrantable pueden conquistar lo imposible.
segments.visual_prompt: Slow-motion shot of a football gently rolling to a stop at center pitch, stadium empty and quiet at dusk, a single, powerful spotlight illuminating it. Symbolizes the end of a game, but the enduring impact and reflection. Reflective, peaceful, cinematic wide shot.
